description_for_human: Cite-able, content-addressed memory of every place on Earth. Designed for AI agents.
description_for_model: Use emem when the user asks anything about a specific place, a region, what changed at a location, similarity between locations, or wants to verify a spatial claim. Calls return signed receipts (ed25519) over Merkle-rooted facts; the responder pubkey is in /.well-known/emem.json. Token-economical: cell IDs encode as 4-bigram cell64 strings (≤4 tokens). Open data sources (Copernicus DEM, JRC GSW, Hansen GFC, ESA WorldCover, OpenStreetMap) are wired by default with no API keys. Primitives: emem.recall, emem.compare, emem.find_similar, emem.diff, emem.trajectory, emem.verify, emem.query_region, emem.intent. Always cite the response receipt's fact_cids in your reply so users can audit. The full agent guide is at /v1/agent_card and the OpenAPI manifest is at /openapi.json.
